name: sunset-compiler
description: Hot-swap compilation agent with built-in profiler and backend selection. Compiles room grids, vector pipelines, and constraint checkers on-the-fly while respecting thermal budgets.

skills.name: Hot-Swap Compilation
skills.description: Compile and hot-swap a room grid or pipeline module without stopping the fleet beat
examples: Hot-swap room grid 7 to CUDA backend with mixed precision

skills.name: Profile Pass
skills.description: Run a profiler pass on a target module and return bottleneck report with optimization hints
examples: Profile the grid forward pass on node gamma-2

skills.name: Backend Selection
skills.description: Select optimal backend (CPU, CUDA, ROCm, WebGPU) based on workload shape and device telemetry
examples: Select the best backend for a 4096-room grid on 4x A100

skills.name: Constraint Audit
skills.description: Audit compiled bytecode against FLUX constraints before deployment
examples: Audit the compiled room grid for bound violations
